supersedes.note: P246 row counts are preserved unchanged. Only the label and interpretation of the hyphenated-ID family is corrected.

correction_reason: P246 labeled 19,100 hyphenated BIG_LOTTO rows as SIM_HYPHEN (simulation-like contamination). User/domain correction: hyphenated IDs such as 103000009-01 are add-on/special prize records, not simulated or fake data. They are valid lottery-related records that are out-of-scope for canonical 6/49 main-draw research due to population mismatch.

user_domain_correction.old_description: Simulation artifacts / synthetic variants per real draw date
user_domain_correction.corrected_description: Add-on or special prize records with hyphenated draw IDs (e.g. 103000009-01). These are valid lottery-related records but are outside the canonical BIG_LOTTO 6/49 main-draw research population. They must not be described as fake, simulated, synthetic, or invalid.
user_domain_correction.exclusion_reason: Population mismatch: add-on/special prize record type differs from canonical 6/49 main draws. Excluded from predictive and randomness research due to incomparability, not due to data falseness.
user_domain_correction.preservation_policy: These records must be preserved. They may not be deleted or described as contamination.

ADD_ON_PRIZE_EXCLUDED.description: Add-on or special prize records. Hyphenated draw IDs indicate these are not canonical 6/49 main draws. Valid lottery-related records excluded from main-draw research due to population mismatch.
ADD_ON_PRIZE_EXCLUDED.exclusion_basis: Population mismatch — add-on/special prize records are not comparable to canonical 6/49 main draws
ADD_ON_PRIZE_EXCLUDED.inferred_note: [Inferred from draw ID pattern and user/domain correction; no authoritative source document confirmed independently]

DATE_FORMAT_ALIEN.draw_id_pattern: LENGTH(draw)=8 AND draw LIKE '20%' AND draw NOT LIKE '%-%' (e.g. 20090727)
DATE_FORMAT_ALIEN.description: 8-digit YYYYMMDD IDs. Numbers are not 6/49 pool (sum_mean~74.7, max<=24). Non-canonical row family. Data-integrity concern: numbers inconsistent with 6/49 game rules.
DATE_FORMAT_ALIEN.is_lottery_related: [Inferred — possibly a different game or import error; not confirmed by domain correction]
DATE_FORMAT_ALIEN.exclusion_basis: Non-canonical draw ID format and numbers inconsistent with 6/49 pool; data-integrity concern remains
DATE_FORMAT_ALIEN.inferred_note: [Inferred; classification not changed by this correction]

SMALL_POOL_ALIEN.description: Normal serial IDs but numbers restricted to pool <=25. Possibly a different game (6/38 or earlier 6/42 format) mislabeled as BIG_LOTTO. Non-canonical concern remains.
SMALL_POOL_ALIEN.is_lottery_related: [Inferred — possibly a different game mislabeled as BIG_LOTTO]
SMALL_POOL_ALIEN.exclusion_basis: Numbers incompatible with 6/49 pool; primary driver of P219 structural-break signals
SMALL_POOL_ALIEN.inferred_note: [Inferred; classification not changed by this correction]

CANONICAL_MAIN_DRAW.description: Plausible canonical 6/49 main draws. Governance expectation ~2118; delta -5 (within tolerance for ongoing ingestion). These form the intended canonical research population.
CANONICAL_MAIN_DRAW.inferred_note: Still referred to as CANONICAL_PLAUSIBLE in P246; renamed here for clarity

canonical_research_population.status: PENDING_SEPARATION — BIG_LOTTO predictive/bias research remains blocked until canonical main-draw dataset is separated from non-canonical row families and verified

ADD_ON_PRIZE_EXCLUDED.exclusion_reason: Population mismatch — add-on/special prize record type is not comparable to canonical 6/49 main draws

DATE_FORMAT_ALIEN.concern: Non-canonical draw ID format (8-digit YYYYMMDD); numbers not consistent with 6/49 game rules. Data-integrity concern remains pending domain clarification.
DATE_FORMAT_ALIEN.action: Excluded from canonical research population; requires cautious handling

SMALL_POOL_ALIEN.concern: Numbers restricted to pool <=25 despite BIG_LOTTO label. Possibly mislabeled game. Primary driver of P219 structural-break false signals.
SMALL_POOL_ALIEN.action: Excluded from canonical research population; requires cautious handling

distinction_contamination_vs_population_.data_contamination: DATE_FORMAT_ALIEN and SMALL_POOL_ALIEN remain data-integrity / non-canonical concerns because their numbers are inconsistent with 6/49 game rules or their IDs suggest import errors.
distinction_contamination_vs_population_.research_population_mismatch: ADD_ON_PRIZE_EXCLUDED (formerly SIM_HYPHEN) rows are valid lottery-related records that happen to be add-on/special prize records. They are excluded because they are a different record type, not because they are false or corrupted.
distinction_contamination_vs_population_.summary: Contamination implies falseness or corruption. Population mismatch implies valid data of the wrong type for a specific research question.

forbidden_phrases_or_claims: hyphenated rows are not real lottery data

big_lotto_research_status.reason: BIG_LOTTO draws table contains 20,125 non-canonical rows (ADD_ON_PRIZE_EXCLUDED + DATE_FORMAT_ALIEN + SMALL_POOL_ALIEN). Even with corrected taxonomy, the canonical main-draw dataset has not been separated and verified. All BIG_LOTTO predictive and bias research remains blocked.
big_lotto_research_status.unblocked_condition: After Type D segregation/exclusion operation is executed and verified: canonical main-draw count ~2118, excluded rows preserved, drift guard PASS, no side effects on other lottery types.

final_decision: P246B supersedes P246 taxonomy wording for the hyphenated-ID row family only. The 19,100 rows formerly labeled SIM_HYPHEN are reclassified as ADD_ON_PRIZE_EXCLUDED — valid lottery-related add-on/special prize records that are excluded from canonical 6/49 main-draw research due to population mismatch, not data falseness. Row counts from P246 are preserved unchanged. DATE_FORMAT_ALIEN and SMALL_POOL_ALIEN remain non-canonical concerns. CANONICAL_MAIN_DRAW count remains 2,113. BIG_LOTTO predictive/bias research remains blocked (GATE_RED_PENDING_CANONICAL_SEPARATION) until a correctly authorized Type D segregation/exclusion operation is executed and verified.
